reviews.comment:
Muy rica la comida y muy buenos precios , los baños siempre impecables y  ni hablar de la atención !! Tamara de la noche muy simpática y siempre brindando lo mejor !! Si cargas combustible con los chicos q son unos capos no dejes de pasar en el servicompra!! Siempre vuelvo

(Translated by Google)
The food was delicious and the prices were great, the bathrooms were always spotless, and the service was amazing! Tamara, who worked the night shift, was so friendly and always went above and beyond! If you fill up with gas from the guys who are fantastic, be sure to stop by the convenience store! I always come back.

reviews.comment:
Yamila, es una de las ejemplares encargadas del servicompras del ACA. Siempre amable y servicial . . Junto con Dalma , logran hacer de nuestro rato de café en un plácido momento.

(Translated by Google)
Yamila is one of the exemplary staff members at the ACA convenience store. Always friendly and helpful. Together with Dalma, they make our coffee break a pleasant experience.

reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención de las chicas del Servicompras. Tamara y Victoria muy expeditivas y con una sonrisa en la cara para atender a todos. Muy buena calidad los productos que compré y que me llevo de regalo para quedar bien....por mi paso por Mercedes. En poco tiempo volveré a visitarlos. Gracias

(Translated by Google)
The service from the Servicompras staff was excellent. Tamara and Victoria were very efficient and always had a smile on their faces when helping everyone. The products I bought were of very good quality, and I'm taking some gifts as a thank you for my visit to Mercedes. I'll be back soon. Thank you!
